description: This screenshot displays the "Add Ingestion" user interface dialog, specifically for "Step 2: 'Dataset Selection Upload Dataset - Raster'", following "Step 1: Input Type Selection". The active method is "File Upload", with "URL Upload" as an alternative. Users can upload data by dragging and dropping files into a designated area or by clicking the "UPLOAD DATASET/S" button. The accepted file formats are .tif, .TIF, .tiff, .Tiff, .zip, .h5, and .gpkg. Ten individual raster files are listed as already selected for upload, each named with the pattern "IMD_2018_010m_E[XX]N[YY]_03035_v020.tif", indicating 2018 High Resolution Layer (HRL) Imperviousness Density (IMD) data at 10 m resolution. Below the file list, two unselected radio button options are presented: "Discrete values" and "Continuous values".
